parent.title: M12: Add human-gated sprint issue creation planner
parent.body:
## Safety Posture
- human-triggered operations only
- read-only planning by default
- no autonomous mutation

## Acceptance Criteria
- Parent issue captures M12 core scope

## Validation
- python -m pytest

children.title: M12: Define human-gated sprint issue creation planning contract
children.body:
Part of #{{PARENT_ISSUE_NUMBER}}
Define architecture contract for read-only planning and human-gated mutation execution.

## Safety Posture
- human-triggered issue creation only
- read-only planning command
- no autonomous GitHub mutation

## Acceptance Criteria
- Contract defines planner inputs, outputs, and safety boundaries

## Validation
- python -m pytest

children.title: M12: Add sprint issue creation plan model and renderer
children.body:
Part of #{{PARENT_ISSUE_NUMBER}}
Implement deterministic plan normalization and rendering model.

## Safety Posture
- human-triggered issue creation only
- read-only planning command
- no autonomous GitHub mutation

## Acceptance Criteria
- Plan model renders parent/child issue bodies deterministically

## Validation
- python -m pytest

children.title: M12: Generate copy-paste-safe PowerShell issue creation blocks
children.body:
Part of #{{PARENT_ISSUE_NUMBER}}
Render copy/paste-safe PowerShell here-strings without nested markdown fences.

## Safety Posture
- human-triggered issue creation only
- read-only planning command
- no autonomous GitHub mutation

## Acceptance Criteria
- Generated script includes parent create and child create phases

## Validation
- python -m pytest

children.title: M12: Add read-only CLI command for sprint issue creation planning
children.body:
Part of #{{PARENT_ISSUE_NUMBER}}
Wire plan-sprint-issues command with output-only posture.

## Safety Posture
- human-triggered issue creation only
- read-only planning command
- no autonomous GitHub mutation

## Acceptance Criteria
- CLI emits JSON and does not mutate GitHub

## Validation
- python -m pytest

children.title: M12: Add regression fixtures for generated sprint issue scripts
children.body:
Part of #{{PARENT_ISSUE_NUMBER}}
Add regression fixtures covering missing child and corrupted body verification failure.

## Safety Posture
- human-triggered issue creation only
- read-only planning command
- no autonomous GitHub mutation

## Acceptance Criteria

## Validation
- python -m pytest
